{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322193150A45A2C06FC7DC8950118"}"},"total":748},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7517817886217945880","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"真不错，节奏不拖沓，人设挺好玩的。前期看不出宫犬系属性，不熟的时候挺高冷的，后面直播完了回家突然像狗狗一样，还觉得有点ooc。前后有点点不一样啊。不过瑕不掩瑜，总体不错"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1750385508,"group_id":"7300878153159822398","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7+NKC5RsgJVICwDJ722RdAPbMNPmJ/7eNY7gSm+1xd8","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"1715661726555440","user_name":"盒子抹茶"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1715661726555440","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7300878153159822398","book_info":{"abstract":"【双男主+无限流+荒野求生+恋综+豪门世家+娱乐圈+灵异】
在无限流世界滞留了数十年的牧轻尘，一朝得以离开却意外穿越到正在参加海岛求生的恋综节目的人身上。
不能违约，牧轻尘只能选择继续留这个直播节目里并且打算待节目结束后，再努力赚钱替原主还清债务。
-
生存恋综的嘉宾们，认识牧轻尘前，这人真的一言难尽，认识后，大佬求带！
-
宫离修视角
节目开始
第一天，牧轻尘和他表白了。
第二天，牧轻尘到底还喜不喜欢他？
第三天，明明不喜欢他，为什么又对他这般好？
第四天，他一定是想默默地喜欢他……嗯。
第五天：“……”他好像被耍了。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2oabcd38f6e9f68c1e8b4f6c5ad751c9ab~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"罐头不好吃","author_id":"","book_id":"7300878153159822398","book_name":"重生：总裁的未婚夫是无限流大佬","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#907870","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"7227人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":275,"name":"双男主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=275&name=双男主&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":29,"name":"总裁","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=29&name=总裁&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":43,"name":"娱乐圈","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=43&name=娱乐圈&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":70,"name":"无限流","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=70&name=无限流&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":69,"name":"直播","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=69&name=直播&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":757,"name":"现代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=757&name=现代&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":473,"name":"豪门世家","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=473&name=豪门世家&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1012,"name":"纯爱","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1012&name=纯爱&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7300878287436251710","read_count":"7227","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"359987"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.3","serial_count":"171","tags":"双男主,现代,总裁,穿越,娱乐圈,直播,豪门世家,纯爱,无限流","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/d099698e17b57fb652b4320018a7ae8a~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779363110&x-signature=fXtSJqQuFlAYQhQRIOB0cC8M%2FvY%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1522145506630771","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"79"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322193150A45A2C06FC7DC8950118"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":8,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":5480,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":2439},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7588031777044284222","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这篇文真的看得我蛮爽的，无限流只是前期一个引子，从两位男主的际遇来说说这本书。宫离修和牧轻尘很有意思的一个设定点，前世今生，但是一个是几千年才能降生一次的十殿阎罗鬼王，一个是仙君经不起千年等待之苦而入轮回转世千年，世世孤独终老，终于在现代遇到了心爱之人
俩人轮回转世都失去了记忆，牧轻尘被人陷害后魂穿进无限流世界，而灵魂上紧紧交缠的俩人让宫离修在没有记忆的情况下也去救了牧轻尘，牧轻尘灵魂穿回原身又失去了自己是原身的记忆，到后面和宫离修亲密接触后才恢复
在俩人转世都是直男的情况下，俩人相处相伴，一点点再次深深爱上彼此，灵魂深处的缠绕注定俩人依旧会在无意识关心对方守护对方
虽然等俩人开窍时间有点久，但是开窍互明心意后就是超级甜，双强互宠的偏爱超爽，到后面宫离修恢复十殿阎罗鬼王记忆，俩人都为彼此付出太多，但是最终俩人完全想起仙君与阎罗的回忆时，一切尽在缠绵中
故事里处理反派也是相当干脆利落，不拖沓，把宫离修和牧轻尘的强表现的淋漓尽致，俩人由直到再次爱上对方的过程可能比较让人急，但是只要看到俩人开窍也算是守得云开见月明，因为实力摆在那里，只能急感情戏了，主线倒是完全不用担心，两个男主太有实力了","text_exts":[{"e":61,"s":57,"text":"前世今生","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%89%8D%E4%B8%96%E4%BB%8A%E7%94%9F&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774179110C8950118%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227588031777044284222%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227300878153159822398%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%89%8D%E4%B8%96%E4%BB%8A%E7%94%9F%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1766731046,"group_id":"7300878153159822398","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"随便写写，看心情不定期更新","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N25Anl6tvhs+Xx3OaLYh8Bc=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/1b4a101233124137a5711cbafbc6d3de~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776708877&x-signature=YEMLOQiTLbUSadoCP3PGK%2FwqZ%2BU%3D","user_id":"598614156250701","user_name":"顺心应华"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"598614156250701","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7300878153159822398","book_info":{"abstrac
